
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>1800) {
    return 1200
  }
  if (inputWidth>1700) {
    return 1100
  }
  if (inputWidth>1600) {
    return 1000
  }
  if (inputWidth>1500) {
    return 900
  }
  if (inputWidth>1400) {
    return 800
  }
  if (inputWidth>1300) {
    return 750
  }
  if (inputWidth>1200) {
    return 700
  }
  if (inputWidth>1100) {
    return 650
  }
  if (inputWidth>1000) {
    return 600
  }
  if (inputWidth>900) {
    return 550
  }
  if (inputWidth>800) {
    return 500
  }
  else {
    return 300
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#FF8732",
  "#502314",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]

// Food
path1 = "M1 21.98c0 .56.45 1.01 1.01 1.01H15c.56 0 1.01-.45 1.01-1.01V21H1v.98zM8.5 8.99C4.75 8.99 1 11 1 15h15c0-4-3.75-6.01-7.5-6.01zM3.62 13c1.11-1.55 3.47-2.01 4.88-2.01s3.77.46 4.88 2.01H3.62zM1 17h15v2H1zM18 5V1h-2v4h-5l.23 2h9.56l-1.4 7H18v2h1.72c.84 0 1.53-.65 1.63-1.47L23 5h-5z"

// Housing
path2 = "M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"

// Energy
path3 = "M9 21c0 .55.45 1 1 1h4c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1H9v1zm3-19C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9c0 2.38 1.19 4.47 3 5.74V17c0 .55.45 1 1 1h6c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-2.26c1.81-1.27 3-3.36 3-5.74 0-3.86-3.14-7-7-7z"

// Mobility
path4 = "M18.92 6.01C18.72 5.42 18.16 5 17.5 5h-11c-.66 0-1.21.42-1.42 1.01L3 12v8c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1h12v1c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-8l-2.08-5.99zM6.5 16c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5S5.67 13 6.5 13s1.5.67 1.5 1.5S7.33 16 6.5 16zm11 0c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zM5 11l1.5-4.5h11L19 11H5z"

// Goods
path5 = "M7 18c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2S5.9 22 7 22s2-.9 2-2-.9-2-2-2zM1 2v2h2l3.6 7.59-1.35 2.45c-.16.28-.25.61-.25.96 0 1.1.9 2 2 2h12v-2H7.42c-.14 0-.25-.11-.25-.25l.03-.12.9-1.63h7.45c.75 0 1.41-.41 1.75-1.03l3.58-6.49c.08-.14.12-.31.12-.48 0-.55-.45-1-1-1H5.21l-.94-2H1zm16 16c-1.1 0-1.99.9-1.99 2s.89 2 1.99 2 2-.9 2-2-.9-2-2-2z"

// Services
path6 = "M12 17.27L18.18 21l-1.64-7.03L22 9.24l-7.19-.61L12 2 9.19 8.63 2 9.24l5.46 4.73L5.82 21z"
```
